scripts.build:all: npm run build:cli && npm run build:desktop
scripts.clippy: cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings && cargo clippy --manifest-path apps/desktop-tauri/src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- -D warnings
scripts.check: npm run version:check && npm run fmt:check && npm run clippy && npm run test && npm run lint && npm run build:desktop
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean && rm -rf apps/desktop-tauri/node_modules && npm run clean:cache
